rationale: Educ. Code §8.104 governs sanctions for deficient regional education service centers. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The commissioner shall develop a system of corrective actions to require of a regional education service center that the commissioner determines to be deficient in an accountability measure under Section 8.103.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and this sanctions provision.
